summary: Added a concrete time anchor in the opening to connect the chapter 13 grocery return to this chapter's two-day aftermath, and sharpened the closing line so the decision points more directly into the southbound Dry Well departure of chapter 15.
edits: Anchored the opening silence to the groceries being hauled back aboard two nights earlier.
Reframed the final line around the trip south to strengthen the handoff into the next chapter.
